    input [31:0] ADD4,
    input [31:0] NPC,
    input [31:0] jrPC,
    input [2:0] PC_sel,
    input CMP_out,
    output [31:0] nextPC
    );assign nextPC = (((PC_sel == 3)) && (jrPC)) || (!((PC_sel == 3)) && (((PC_sel == 2)||((PC_sel == 1)&&(CMP_out == 1)))?NPC:ADD4));endmodule
